title: Verify your email
helperWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}.
helperGeneric: We sent a verification link to your email.
instruction: Click the link in the email to activate your account.

verifying.title: Verifying your email
verifying.helper: Hang tight — this should only take a moment.

failed.title: Verification failed
failed.helper: This link is invalid or has expired.

verified.title: Email verified
verified.helper: Your account is ready to go.
